title: Claude 2026 Prompting and Claude Code Practice
description: Apply current Anthropic guidance to tool use, examples, context, and long-running coding. Learners cumulatively produce a Claude-specific prompt and eval suite through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use clear direct instructions, motivation, and relevant context for current Claude models.
Use diverse examples and structural tags when they improve task boundary recognition.
Steer tool selection with descriptions and instructions, using enforced tool choice only when required.
